title: LOW COST WELLNESS AND VACCINE CLINIC - 211info
text: SOUTH COAST HUMANE SOCIETY LOW COST WELLNESS AND VACCINE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a pet wellness clinic offering exams, vaccinations, microchips, ear and gland cleaning, nail trimming, and flea medication. 828 Railroad Street Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Visit website for current schedule Email (541) 412-0325 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 412-0325 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service; visit website for details DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: Neuter/Spay Services Well Animal Checkups Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - ANIMAL RESCUE AND ADOPTION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
